message:
feat(web): add changelog page with version history

Implements a public changelog page at /changelog with:

- Chronological version entries with date, title, and description
- Change categorization: New, Improved, Fixed
- Visual timeline design with latest version highlighting
- TypeScript-native changelog data structure
- SEO-optimized metadata
- Feature request CTA linking to GitHub issues

Version entries cover the development history from v0.1.0
through v0.9.0 including recent admin dashboard work.

Addresses: jeffreysprompts.com-ezv2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
